_comment_homestead: Homestead-focused map for tutorial home, compound, surrounding zones.
_comment_source: Duplicate this level to create Homestead if missing (ensure_homestead_map.py).
_comment_volume: PCG volume center and half-extents in cm. Compound exclusion so trees do not spawn inside walls. PCG transform_offset_z is in pcg_forest_config.json (shared graph).
_comment_exclusion_zones: Compound bounds (center + half-extents in cm). Default 30m x 30m box at origin.
_comment_placeholder_actors: Optional. Run place_homestead_placeholders.py with Homestead open to spawn Cube placeholders at these positions (cm). label = actor label; scale = uniform scale.
